features.name: event-triggered always block with $finish and recursive event firing
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered by a dynamic event that fires the same event from within the block and calls $finish based on a counter condition

features.name: final block state validation after $finish
features.description: Code should include a final block that validates a counter state after $finish has been called, expecting a specific value

features.name: event triggering in initial and always blocks
features.description: Code should include an initial block that triggers an event after a delay, followed by an always block that responds to the same event
